sigWerErrors.reason: The substitution changes the meaning from 'first' (先) to 'now' (现), which alters the temporal context of the instruction.
The extra '我' (I/me) is redundant but does not significantly change the meaning of the sentence.
The substitution changes 'tracking' (追踪) to 'respect' (尊重), which makes the phrase incoherent and derails the intended meaning of 'tracking number'.
The substitution changes 'number' (码) to the question particle '吗', which removes the key information and changes the sentence structure.
